fields.title: Naruto
fields.author: Masashi Kishimoto
fields.description: The beginning of Naruto's journey � a young ninja with a dream.

fields.title: Bocchi the Rock
fields.author: Aki Hamaji
fields.description: Bocchi is a shy girl who finds her voice through rock music.

fields.title: Fullmetal Alchemist
fields.author: Hiromu Arakawa
fields.description: Edward and Alphonse Elric begin their alchemical journey after tragedy strikes.

fields.title: Attack on Titan
fields.author: Hajime Isayama
fields.description: Humanity fights for survival as colossal Titans threaten their existence.

fields.title: Death Note
fields.author: Tsugumi Ohba & Takeshi Obata
fields.description: Light Yagami discovers a notebook that allows him to kill by writing names.

fields.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
fields.author: Gege Akutami
fields.description: Yuji Itadori joins a secret organization of sorcerers to fight curses and protect humanity.
